name: Factory Excel Ops Dashboard
purpose: Classify spreadsheet exports, normalize fields, compute configurable operations metrics, and export a local dashboard.

inputs.input_dir: Folder containing CSV or XLSX files.
inputs.output_dir: Folder where summary.json and dashboard.html will be written.
inputs.min_confidence: Minimum file classification confidence. Defaults to 0.2.
inputs.max_file_mb: Maximum input file size in MB. Defaults to 25. Use 0 to disable.

outputs.status: Exit code 0 when config is valid, 2 when errors are found.

outputs.analysis_context: Structured context for reporting and workflow review.

outputs.zip_file: Portable source package without cache, output, or local runtime folders.

packaging_notes: Keep private adapters separate from the core package.
Load local field mappings and metric profiles from config before running.
Use sample_data only for demos and tests.
Write generated reports to output or another ignored folder.
Use scripts/package_project.py to create a clean handoff package.
